item.title: FDA Psychedelic Priority Review Vouchers
item.description:
• Summary: The FDA has awarded national priority review vouchers to several companies developing psychedelic therapies, including Compass Pathways and USONA, under the Trump administration's push for mental health treatments. The move aims to accelerate development and regulatory review of psychedelic drugs for conditions like PTSD and depression. Three undisclosed companies also received vouchers, highlighting a broader shift in regulatory policy toward psychedelic research.
  • MoAs: N/A
  • Sources: Fierce Biotech, STAT News, Endpoints News, BioSpace, STAT News

item.title: Patient Confidence Survey
item.description:
• Summary: A recent survey reveals that patients are less confident than ever about their health choices, citing confusion from information overload, conflicting advice, and distrust in the healthcare system. The findings underscore the need for clearer communication and trust-building initiatives from healthcare providers and pharmaceutical companies.
  • MoAs: N/A
  • Sources: Fierce Pharma
